channel.title: GRIDWATCH
channel.description: Outages x weather x data center proximity, Midwest to Atlantic

item.title: GRIDWATCH 2026-07-19T04:33Z — 1593 outages, 90,407 customers, 708 fair-weather, 13 DC-proximate
item.description: PA-PPL: 2667 cust (UNEXPLAINED FAIR-WEATHER) | BGE: 2450 cust (UNEXPLAINED FAIR-WEATHER) | VA-DOM: 2178 cust (UNEXPLAINED FAIR-WEATHER) | PA-NY: 1609 cust (WEATHER-LIKELY) | OH-AEP: 1500 cust (UNEXPLAINED FAIR-WEATHER)
